technical_replicate: All data are expressed as the mean of triplicate samples.
experimental_design: the inhibition of CDK1 activity in vivo reduces the lethality of the JEV-infected WT mice by enhancing the MAVS expression.
factor_value: the CDK1 activity inhibitor RO3306 or the negative-control DMSO was injected.
number_of_biological_replicates: WT or MAVS−/− mice were randomly assigned to four groups.
